A psychotechnology is a term used by [[John Vervaeke]]

[[Alo]] is an example of one, as is graphing, and memory places

== Definition 1 (episode 2) ==
* A standardized way of doing information processing that improves and enhances cognition by linking brains together including your brain to your own future states of your brain your brain to other people's brains"<ref name=":0">[[Awakening from the Meaning Crisis]] episode 2, [[John Vervaeke]] https://youtu.be/aF9HeXg65AE?t=2820</ref><ref name=":1">{{Cite web |date=2022-10-11 |title=Glossary of Vervekian terms - Google Docs |url=https://web.archive.org/web/20221011000617/https://docs.google.com/document/d/1FWZSdPa996VseFAJFfQ-Xu4RN_2JoK9V7maoFmzXgaE/edit |access-date=2022-11-01 |website=web.archive.org}}</ref>
* A psychotechnology fits to your brain and enhances it<ref name=":0" /><ref name=":1" />

== Definition 2 (episode 42) ==
A more elaborate definition offered by John in episode 42<ref name=":2">https://youtu.be/H1yDgjQdRHw?list=PLND1JCRq8Vuh3f0P5qjrSdb5eC1ZfZwWJ&t=197</ref><ref name=":1" />

* A socially generated and standardized way of formatting, manipulating, and enhancing information processing that is readily internalizable into human cognition and can be applied in a domain general manner. It must extend and empower cognition in a reliable and extensive manner and be highly generalizable among people.<ref name=":2" /><ref name=":1" />

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Psychotechnology]]==References==

<references />
[[Category:Pages]]
